visual_description: A group of men in suits walks across a dimly lit urban street at night, some with their backs to the camera, others facing forward. They are flanked by parked cars and illuminated streetlights, with tall buildings visible in the background. One man in the foreground turns his head slightly to the side, while others maintain forward motion, their postures upright and purposeful.
